8.title: Activities
8.content:
Each year, we organize tons of activities, like ZomaarBike, ZomaarRun, kids animation, a quiz and petanque game. On Sunday you will also find a paella stand.



All of our activities require a registration fee: ZomaarBike (€5/€7), ZomaarRun (€5), Petanque (€5), ZomaarQuiz (€10).



Registration for the petanque game or the paella stand is required. You can register here:
8.tba: (Registration to be announced at a later date)
